signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Announced | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Announced | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Alpenglow upgrade aims to slash Solana transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 milliseconds, representing a significant technical advancement.[1] This upgrade is part of broader network improvements documented as of April 14, 2026.
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 19, 2:25PM-2:30PM ET

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4%; this is the latest confirmed data as of search results updated through March 2026[1].  
The Bank of Korea recently held its policy rate at 2.5% and raised its 2026 inflation outloo

signals.headline: Solana Reaches All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Reaches All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**

Solana has hit a historic milestone with 167 million monthly token holders and daily non-vote transactions reaching 148 million as of mid-April 2026.[1] This represents substantial network adoption growth.

signals.headline: Institutional SOL Holdings at Record Levels | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Institutional SOL Holdings at Record Levels | YES | HIGH confidence**

Major financial institutions including BlackRock and Fidelity have disclosed record SOL ETF holdings despite recent market consolidation.[1] This signals continued institutional confidence despite broader price weakness.
